primary_win_condition: Use Iono's Bellibolt ex as an energy acceleration engine, spread Basic Lightning Energy across Iono's Pokemon, and attack primarily with Iono's Voltorb's scaling non-ex attack when its expected damage is high enough.
sub_win_conditions: Iono's Bellibolt ex attacks as a backup or closer when 230 damage is needed or Voltorb is unavailable
Iono's Kilowattrel acts as a non-ex follow-up attacker and draw support, not the default main win condition
Energy Retrieval / Night Stretcher / Max Rod sustain Lightning Energy and Iono's Pokemon so Voltorb damage scaling stays online

voltorb_scaling_attack.side_efficiency_note: Voltorb is non-ex, so prefer Voltorb when its expected damage is comparable to or better than Bellibolt ex / Kilowattrel attacks.

attacker_selection_policy.primary_rule: Prefer the attacker with the best combination of expected damage, KO potential, prize efficiency, and next-turn risk.
prefer_voltorb_when: Voltorb has at least 2 energy and can legally attack
Voltorb's estimated scaling damage can take KO or apply meaningful pressure
Bellibolt ex attacking would expose a 2-prize Pokemon without a clear damage advantage
use_bellibolt_attack_when: Bellibolt ex's fixed 230 damage reaches an important KO that Voltorb cannot reach
Voltorb is not ready or has been knocked out
The opponent's board requires immediate 230 damage pressure
use_kilowattrel_attack_when: Voltorb is not ready and Kilowattrel can maintain non-ex pressure
Kilowattrel attack is the best legal damage option
Kilowattrel's draw ability does not break attack readiness

energy_policy.core_rule: Energy attached anywhere on own Iono's Pokemon increases Voltorb damage, so Bellibolt ex Ability should value distributed Lightning Energy, not only Bellibolt attack readiness.
attach_priorities: get Voltorb to 2 energy when it can attack
spread Lightning Energy to Iono's Pokemon to raise Voltorb damage
prepare Tadbulb/Bellibolt ex as the energy engine
prepare Kilowattrel as backup attacker/draw support
avoid over-focusing energy on Bellibolt ex if Voltorb already provides better prize-efficient damage
